# Oviedo

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Capacidad De Carga](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/capacidad-de-carga/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Rellenos](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones-rellenos/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/compresion-simple/)
- [Ensayo Spt](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/ensayo-spt/)
- [Ensayos In Situ](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/ensayos-in-situ/)
- [Estabilidad Taludes](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/estabilidad-taludes/)
- [Estabilizacion Taludes](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/estabilizacion-taludes/)
- [Estudio Mecanica Suelos](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/estudio-mecanica-suelos/)
- [Excavaciones Profundas](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/excavaciones-profundas/)
- [Excavaciones Subterraneas](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/excavaciones-subterraneas/)
- [Exploracion](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/exploracion/)
- [Factor Seguridad](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/factor-seguridad/)
- [Falla Taludes](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/falla-taludes/)
- [Flujos Detritos](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/flujos-detritos/)
- [Geofisica](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/geofisica/)
- [Georradar Gpr](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/georradar-gpr/)
- [Geotecnia Vial](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/geotecnia-vial/)
- [Infiltracion](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/infiltracion/)
- [Laboratorio](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/laboratorio/)
- [Licuefaccion](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/licuefaccion/)
- [Masw Vs30](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/masw-vs30/)

- [Sismica](https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/sismica/)

## Contact
- Website: https://oviedo.geotecnia.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
